SET DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_USER_PERMS_SET('user1', <http://example.org/graph1>, (SELECT perms FROM users_permissions WHERE username='user1'));
SET DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_USER_PERMS_SET('user1', (SELECT graph_iri FROM graph_info WHERE graph_owner='user1'), 'READ');
SET DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_USER_PERMS_SET('user1', <http://example.org/graph1>, (SELECT STRING_AGG(perm, ', ') FROM user_permissions WHERE username='user1'));

SET DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_USER_PERMS_SET('user1', <http://example.org/graph1>, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 'READ' ELSE 'NONE' END FROM user_conditions WHERE username='user1' AND condition_met = TRUE));
